title: Logic behind the Automation recipe
excerpt:
What is the logic behind the automation recipe? 
Ex. Are certain recipes prioritize over other?

posts.author: ryo (Ryosuke Aramaki)
posts.cookedHtml:
What is the logic behind the automation recipe?
Ex. Are certain recipes prioritize over other?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @ryo, thanks for posting about this!

Certain recipes are not prioritized over other ones. Was there a specific situation where you were running into this, or where you had automations with “overlapping” triggers? I’d be happy to take a closer look!
